title: Elide wrap checks using round-determined leaf depth
methodology: Specialized each unrolled round by compile-time tree depth so non-leaf rounds skip the idx<n_nodes/vselect wrap sequence, and the leaf round stores zero indices directly instead of computing children that always wrap.
motivation: Brief suggested branch optimization; this tests a deterministic-wrap variant not listed among prior experiments by exploiting the perfect-tree depth schedule from the round number.
